The '''Zehr Sea''' was a [[Water/Legends|sea]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Delassin VI|Delassin Six]]. The [[Vodran (species)/Legends|Vodran]] [[Xenon Nnaksta]] worked as a [[longshoreman]] at docks for [[Boat/Legends|vessels]] that traveled on the sea.<ref name="The Greel Wood Haven" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Zehr Sea was first mentioned in "[[The Greel Wood Haven]]," an article written by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]] in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 6]], which was released in [[May]] [[1995]].<ref name="The Greel Wood Haven" />
